items.title: Why Interactive Brokers Stock Zoomed 35.3% Higher In The First Half of 2026
items.summary: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) stock surged 35.3% in the first half of 2026, driven by strong customer account growth (31% increase to 4.75 million), revenue expansion, and expansion into new markets like South Korea. The company maintains exceptional profitability with a 77% pre-tax margin. However, the stock's elevated P/E ratio of 41 and 500% five-year gains suggest investors should not expect similar returns going forward.
